name: Creation
tagline: Conjure objects and raw materials out of nothing.

baseAbility.name: Alter
baseAbility.description: Standard action, touch, on a single unattended, non-magical, inanimate object. Deal 1d4 + half your CL damage bypassing hardness (breaking it below half HP), or repair the same amount. You can also instill an alter effect into a small container of liquid as a standard action, usable later like a potion.

talents.name: Create
talents.description: Conjure a temporary, non-magical Small object (or larger with more SP/talents) out of nothing, made of a basic material you know.

talents.name: Material Mastery
talents.description: Unlock the ability to alter/create tougher materials (metal, then precious metal, then exotic materials at higher CL).

talents.name: Permanency
talents.description: Make a created or altered object permanent instead of temporary.

talents.name: Divided Creation
talents.description: Double the size/quantity of object you can alter or create at once.

talents.name: Craftsman
talents.description: Create or alter objects with real craftsmanship, letting you shape complex, functional items rather than just raw material.

talents.name: Ranged Creation
talents.description: Alter/Create works at close range instead of requiring touch.

talents.name: Mass Creation
talents.description: Alter or create multiple separate objects with a single casting.

talents.name: Instant Fortification
talents.description: Create simple structures (walls, barriers, cover) rather than only discrete objects.

talents.name: Elemental Materials
talents.description: Create objects out of elemental substances (ice, fire-touched metal, etc.) with minor bonus effects.

talents.name: Quick Creation
talents.description: Reduce the casting time of Alter/Create by one step.
